reference: I do not have any abnormalities except for the luteinizing hormone. I took Krimson for three months. I performed a hysterosalpingography test. While undergoing a follicular study, my ovum did not rupture. I was given a gonadotropin injection to trigger ovulation. I am also taking Naturogest three hundred milligrams. I felt very dizzy and nauseated. Then I was given Naturogest one hundred milligrams to be taken in the morning and at night. I still feel dizzy. What should I do?
text: I do not have any abnormalities except for the leutinizing hormone. I took Princeton for three months. I performed a histo-alpinography test. While undergoing a follicular study, my ovum did not rupture. I was given a gonadotropin injection to trigger ovulation. I am also taking Naturogest 300 mg. I felt very dizzy and nauseated. Then, I was given Naturogest 100 mg to be taken in the morning and at night. I still feel dizzy. What should I do?
